$comment: Provider registry for Crow's multi-agent orchestrator. See docs/plans/cached-nibbling-clover.md.

crow-voice.$description: Fast voice/dispatch model for the AI Companion. Qwen3.5-4B (text-only) BF16 via vLLM-ROCm on Strix Halo gfx1151, :8011. Text-only: the model is natively vision-language but its ViT encoder OOMs (256 GiB) during vLLM-ROCm multimodal profiling on gfx1151, so image/video input is disabled (--limit-mm-per-prompt). Vision-bearing turns escalate to crow-chat (35B, multimodal) or grackle-vision. NO mutexGroup + alwaysResident so it co-resides with the warm 35B and never evicts it.

crow-dispatch.$description: Fast tool-dispatch + Maker Lab classroom endpoint. Strix Halo gfx1151 via vLLM-ROCm.

crow-chat.$description: Daily-driver MoE (3B active) + vision. Qwen3.6-35B-A3B UD-Q6_K + MTP (--spec-type draft-mtp --spec-draft-n-max 2) + mmproj-F16 via llama.cpp Vulkan RADV (vulkan-radv-mtp toolbox) on Strix Halo. Benchmarked 2026-05-23: ~66 tok/s single-stream (MTP forces -np 1), KLD 0.012 vs BF16 (near-lossless); 35B is faster on Vulkan than ROCm. Vision + MTP co-load (verified).

crow-swap-coder.$description: On-demand coder specialist. MoE via llama.cpp Vulkan AMDVLK on Strix Halo. Mutexed with all other crow-* bundles on Strix Halo's unified 124 GB pool.

crow-swap-deep.$description: On-demand deep-reasoning specialist. GLM-4.5-Air 106B/12B MoE via llama.cpp Vulkan AMDVLK. Mutexed with all other crow-* bundles on Strix Halo's unified 124 GB pool.

grackle-embed.$description: Text embeddings for semantic memory/research/blog search. Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B BF16 via vLLM-CUDA on grackle. Always-resident (kept up by gpu-orchestrator) because embed outages silently break memory stores.

grackle-rerank.$description: Cross-encoder reranker for top-K reordering after hybrid FTS+vector retrieval. Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B BF16 via vLLM-CUDA on grackle. Shares mutex group grackle-specialists-swap with grackle-vision on the 16 GB card.

grackle-vision.$description: Vision-language model for image understanding + OCR + structured output. Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct-FP8 via vLLM-CUDA on grackle. Swapped in on demand by gpu-orchestrator; mutex with grackle-rerank.
